creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #1)
> It pains me to say this but it might be best to wait with this until bug
> #212112 is resolved.  There are problems with using the version of Bullet
> currently in the ports tree with OpenMW 0.40.0 like falling through bridges
> and probably other collision detection problems.

You could remove bullet-related cmake patch here then.
